X^12 - X^11*Y + 744*X^11 + 196680*X^10 + 187*X^9*Y + 21354080*X^9 + 506*X^8*Y + 830467440*X^8 - 
    11440*X^7*Y + 16875327744*X^7 - 57442*X^6*Y + 208564958976*X^6 + 184184*X^5*Y + 1678582287360*X^5
    + 1675784*X^4*Y + 9031525113600*X^4 + 1867712*X^3*Y + 32349979904000*X^3 - 8252640*X^2*Y + 
    74246810880000*X^2 - 19849600*X*Y + 98997734400000*X + Y^2 - 8720000*Y + 58411072000000
